about:
Wheedle Technologies is a full-spectrum digital transformation and AI automation company enabling non-IT businesses to become technology-driven enterprises. In a rapidly evolving digital economy, organizations need powerful, scalable, and intelligent technology ecosystems- but building and managing in-house IT capabilities is often complex and resource-intensive. Wheedle bridges this gap as a strategic outsourced technology and growth partner.

We align AI agents, strategy, and execution to deliver solutions built around your business goals.

We focus on building long-term partnerships based on trust, collaboration, and sustained business growth.

Backed by a team of passionate professionals, we keep our customers at the core of our services, making development decisions with clear transparency and communication.

Wheedle Technologies has built a name for itself with the end-to-end support from brainstorming ideas for 24/7 after-deployment customer support and beyond.

We can be your IT partner, delivering solutions that help you gain a prominent name in the digital race with software and services tailored for your business

Bridging Business and Technology with AI-Driven Excellence

We deliver integrated digital infrastructure that combines software engineering, AI innovation, automation systems, and growth technologies under one unified platform. Instead of managing multiple vendors for web development, digital marketing, automation, telephony, infrastructure, and IT operations, businesses partner with Wheedle for a single, cohesive technology ecosystem led by expert teams.

Our role is simple: you focus on business growth while we architect, implement, and manage the digital foundation that powers it.

Our journey started with a simple goal — to help businesses leverage technology to solve real-world problems. Over time, we have grown into a technology partner for companies looking to innovate, automate, and scale their operations. We believe that technology should not be complicated. Our mission is to simplify digital transformation by creating solutions that are reliable, scalable, and easy to use.

We deliver measurable business outcomes—not just technology tools.

Wheedle serves as a long-term outsourced digital, AI, and IT transformation partner, aligning technology strategy with business performance objectives. Our intelligent systems are engineered to create competitive advantage through automation, data intelligence, and seamless digital experiences.

Increase qualified lead generation and revenue growth

Reduce manual dependencies and operational overheads

From AI-driven contact centres and smart CRM ecosystems to autonomous design systems and intelligent digital platforms, Wheedle redefines how modern businesses operate, compete, and scale.

To simplify technology adoption by delivering powerful, scalable, and cost-efficient digital and AI solutions that accelerate business growth and elevate customer experiences. Not every organization requires an in-house IT department, but every organization requires exceptional technology leadership. Wheedle Technologies fulfills that role as your outsourced technology, automation, and growth partner- ensuring digital systems, customer engagement, and business operations work seamlessly together.

To be the world’s most trusted digital transformation and intelligent automation partner for non-IT enterprises - empowering them to compete, scale, and succeed through connected technology ecosystems.

Wheedle Technologies delivers an end-to-end digital ecosystem designed for organizations seeking sustainable growth, operational efficiency, and superior customer engagement—without the need for an internal IT department.

Custom Software Development & Intelligent Business Platforms

AI Web Engineering & High-Performance Website Development

Digital Marketing, Performance Campaigns & Lead Generation

CRM Systems & End-to-End Business Process Automation

AI-Powered Solutions & Intelligent Workflow Systems

Autonomous IT Operations & Infrastructure Automation

All solutions are seamlessly interconnected, enabling marketing, sales, operations, and customer service to function within one intelligent, scalable system.

We also architect and manage advanced customer communication infrastructures for modern enterprises:

Our platforms empower businesses to deliver enterprise-grade customer experiences without heavy infrastructure investment or large technical teams.

career:
Join Wheedles’, a workplace where we foster your growth and learning process with real-life projects that create impact for our clients.

At Wheedle’s, we provide meaningful opportunities to grow, learn, and advance your career. Be a part of a workplace that’s just as committed to you as it is to the clients.

We are always on the lookout for innovative ideas that can be tomorrow’s success blueprint.

We structure and align opportunities to provide learning and growth scope to our employees.

We foster teamwork, open communication, and shared ownership across and within teams.

Get a chance to work on real-world projects that create measurable value for clients, forming bonds that go beyond project delivery.

Our core values represent the principles that guide our decisions, shape our culture, and influence how we collaborate, innovate, and deliver value to our clients.

We believe in transparency, be it with the client or our employees. We handle our projects with integrity and openness.

We place our clients at the center of everything we do by understanding their business goals, challenges, and expectations.

We believe in taking ownership of our work and responsibilities, ensuring commitments are met with integrity, transparency, and consistent delivery.

No one in Wheedle believes in power misuse. Every idea and voice is respected and guided towards mutual favour and benefit.

Wheedle Technologies believes in ethical practices, and recognizing contributions fairly, giving everyone a chance to grow and learn.

- Plan and execute digital marketing campaigns across SEO, SEM, Social Media, Email & Content - Manage and grow our presence on LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube & X (Twitter) - Analyze campaign performance using Google Analytics, Meta Ads Manager & other tools - Create engaging content calendars and coordinate with the design team - Run paid ad campaigns (Google Ads, Meta Ads) and optimize for ROI - Monitor trends, competitor activity, and industry news

- Design intuitive user interfaces for web and mobile applications - Create wireframes, prototypes, user flows, and high-fidelity mockups - Conduct user research, usability testing, and A/B testing - Collaborate with developers to ensure pixel-perfect implementation - Build and maintain a consistent design system and component library - Translate business requirements into clean, functional designs

- Design social media creatives, banners, brochures, presentations & marketing collateral - Develop brand identity assets including logos, style guides, and templates - Collaborate with the marketing and content team on campaigns - Create motion graphics and short video edits when required - Ensure all designs align with brand guidelines and quality standards - Handle multiple projects and meet tight deadlines

- Handle end-to-end recruitment: sourcing, screening, interviewing & onboarding - Maintain employee records, HRMS data, and attendance management - Coordinate performance appraisal cycles and employee engagement activities - Draft HR policies, offer letters, and employment contracts - Manage payroll inputs, leave management, and compliance documentation - Address employee grievances and ensure smooth HR operations

- Coordinate between the sales team, clients, and internal departments - Prepare sales proposals, quotations, presentations, and reports - Manage CRM data, track leads, and maintain pipeline records - Schedule meetings, follow up on proposals, and handle client communications - Assist in achieving monthly and quarterly sales targets - Generate MIS reports and sales dashboards for the management team

- Develop and execute sales strategies to achieve revenue targets - Build and manage a high-performing sales team - Identify new business opportunities and establish client relationships - Oversee the full sales cycle: prospecting, demos, negotiations & closures - Collaborate with marketing to align campaigns with sales goals - Prepare accurate sales forecasts, pipeline reports, and performance reviews - Represent the company at industry events, conferences, and client meetings

Honesty, fairness, and respect in all interactions.

Readiness to take responsibilities and deliver on commitments.

Cooperating with the team and valuing diverse perspectives.

Ready to grow your career with a team that values your potential? Join us.
